items.title: OpenAI Newsroom (@OpenAINewsroom) / Posts / X
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has made several significant announcements in early April 2026. The company officially retired the GPT-4o model from all plans effective April 3, 2026, and replaced o1-mini with o3-mini as the default reasoning model for ChatGPT Plus subscribers. OpenAI also launched 'Flex compute,' a pricing tier offering o3 at a 30% discount during off-peak hours, and pushed a major update to GPT-5.4 that reduces refusals on benign edge-case requests by 40% while extending context window handling. items.title: OpenAI Retires GPT-4o and Daily AI Updates for April 2026
items.author: www.aiandnews.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with major model and product releases in early 2026. In March 2026, OpenAI launched three new GPT-5 family models: GPT-5.3 Instant (fast everyday tasks), GPT-5.4 Thinking (complex professional workflows), and GPT-5.4 Pro (highest capability). Earlier in February, they released GPT-5.3-Codex and its smaller real-time coding variant GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark. A security-focused agentic researcher called Aardvark (later rebranded to Codex Security) was rolled out to enterprise cust

items.title: GPT-5.5 Is Coming in 2026: Release Date, Features - Panstag
items.author: www.panstag.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively releasing new models in early 2026. The most notable recent launch is GPT-5.3-Codex, their most capable agentic coding model, which combines the Codex and GPT-5 training stacks and is approximately 25% faster while setting new benchmarks on coding tasks. Additionally, GPT-5.4 has been released as OpenAI's newest frontier model for professional work, available via the Chat Completions and Responses API, with a 'pro' variant for more complex problems. items.title: OpenAI Research Index
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI's recent research publications in 2026 span several key areas including AI safety, alignment, and scientific collaboration. Notable work includes a study on chain-of-thought monitorability, analyzing real-world coding agent deployments to detect misalignment risks and strengthen safety safeguards. OpenAI also published research on instruction hierarchy (IH-Challenge), training models to prioritize trusted instructions and resist prompt injection attacks. Their Model Spec framework was upd
